inputs.label: Inlet Pressure
inputs.businessContext: The absolute pressure at compressor inlet, typically atmospheric pressure (1 bar).

businessContext_i18n.en: The absolute pressure at compressor inlet, typically atmospheric pressure (1 bar).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kompresör girişindeki mutlak basınç, tipik olarak atmosfer basıncı (1 bar).

inputs.label: Outlet Pressure
inputs.businessContext: The desired discharge pressure after compression.

businessContext_i18n.en: The desired discharge pressure after compression.

inputs.label: Flow Rate (Inlet Conditions)
inputs.businessContext: Volumetric flow rate at inlet pressure and temperature.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volumetric flow rate at inlet pressure and temperature.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Giriş basıncı ve sıcaklığındaki hacimsel debi.

inputs.label: Adiabatic Index (k)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of specific heats (Cp/Cv) for the gas, typically 1.4 for air.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of specific heats (Cp/Cv) for the gas, typically 1.4 for air.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gazın özgül ısı oranı (Cp/Cv), tipik olarak hava için 1.4.

inputs.label: Compressor Isentropic Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the compressor in converting adiabatic work to shaft work.

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency of the compressor in converting adiabatic work to shaft work.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kompresörün adyabatik işi mil işine dönüştürme verimliliği.

inputs.label: Motor Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the electric motor driving the compressor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency of the electric motor driving the compressor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kompresörü tahrik eden elektrik motorunun verimliliği.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
